revision.comment: Added the ⟨◌͘ ⟩and ⟨◌·⟩ diacritics (used in the letters O͘o͘ and Ŀŀ respectively; both located in the "Letters using dot sign" block).
Bot: wrap 14 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23508203007|commit triggered pipeline]]
Added the ⟨◌͘ ⟩and ⟨◌·⟩ diacritics (used in the letters O͘o͘ and Ŀŀ respectively; both located in the "Letters using dot sign" block).
1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
